subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Praise be to God that which streamed forth from the pen of this wanderer two or three years ago [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله آنچه از قلم این آواره در دو سال سه سال پیش صادر
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @non-participation in politics, @obedience to and respect for government authority
